address: Not stated (4-bed bungalow, likely premium London suburb or South East based on £3,400/month LTL and £355/night STL)
lead_profile_text: 4-bed bungalow with roof terrace and garden, freshly renovated, fully furnished by Natalia, next door to her own home. Owned 8 years; self-managed LTL at £3,400/month. Tenants left ~2 months ago; property vacant. Oil heating (not gas). EPCR due for renewal. Switching due to bad tenants, Section 21 legislative changes, and desire for flexibility to sell. Linen hire to be arranged via Stayful; Natalia's sheets to remain for staging.
emotional_profile: Measured and considered — motivated by control, risk mitigation (Section 21), and flexibility to sell. Not income-driven. Responds to control narrative and risk framing rather than financial uplift.
green_light_types: mid-July target aligned to August peak demand
what_moved_them: 13%+VAT offer with clear 25 June expiry providing decision structure
Mid-July onboarding timeline aligned with August peak demand
what_fell_flat: Income comparison — STL net (£3,137/month) is below Natalia's previous self-managed LTL gross (£3,400/month); do not use as a selling point

conversion_gaps.gap: EPCR renewal outstanding (oil heating, not gas)
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Stayful to oversee EPCR renewal; confirm timing as part of onboarding action

conversion_gaps.gap: Risk of re-letting LTL at £3,400/month if good tenant found quickly before offer expiry
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Reinforce Section 21 legislative risk and control-over-adjacent-property narrative in follow-up; avoid income comparison entirely

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (vs standard 15%+VAT) if signed before 25 June 2026; ~2 weeks onboarding to target mid-July launch for August bookings
zac_income_intro: ~£3,137/month average net (range £2,200–£4,400); 56% occupancy; £355/night ADR. Note: approximately equal to self-managed LTL net — framed as flexibility and risk mitigation, not income upgrade
zac_reassurance_phrases: linen hire includes tea, coffee, toiletries
